opinion.h1: OIL FIELDS CORPORATION v. DASHKO, 275 U.S. 548 (1927)
opinion.h2: OIL FIELDS CORPORATION Petitioner, v. John S. DASHKO, T. P. Novick, Olga Novick, et al. *
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Mr. Albert L. Wilson, of El Dorado, Ark., for petitioner.
Petition for a writ of certiorari to the Supreme Court of the State of Arkansas denied.
[Footnote *] Motion for leave to file petition for rehearing denied 48 S. Ct. 206, 72 L. Ed. -.[ Oil Fields Corporation v. Dashko 275 U.S. 548 (1927) ]
